overview.short: Kappad, or Kappakadavu locally, is a beach and village near Koyilandy, in the Kozhikode district, Kerala, India.
overview.description: Kappad, or Kappakadavu locally, is a beach and village near Koyilandy, in the Kozhikode district, Kerala, India. A stone monument installed by government commemorates the "landing" by Vasco da Gama with the inscription, 'Vasco da Gama landed here, Kappakadavu, in the year 1498'. In 2007 a Rs. 1.5 crore program to beautify the beach was launched by [Kerala] Tourism Minister Kodiyeri Balakrishnan.

Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Vettilappara
topPlaces.description: Vettilappara is a village in Malappuram district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Kanjilassery Maha Siva Temple
topPlaces.description: Kanjilassery Maha Siva Temple is located at Chemancheri village in Kozhikode district, in Kerala, India. The presiding deity of the temple is Lord Shiva, located in main Sanctum Sanctorum, facing west.

topPlaces.name: Chemancheri
topPlaces.description: Chemanchery is a village in Kozhikode district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Vengalam
topPlaces.description: Vengalam is a town in Kerala, India, approximately 10 km from Kozhikode Railway Station (Calicut City) and very near Kappad Beach. The landmark is the Railway Overbridge inaugurated by Chief Minister V. S. Achuthanandan.

topPlaces.name: Chengottukavu
topPlaces.description: Chengottukavu is a village in Kozhikode district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Thalakkulathur
topPlaces.description: Thalakkulathur is a small village near Kozhikode city, along the road to Atholi, in the state of Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Elathur, Kozhikode
topPlaces.description: Elathur is a part of Calicut corporation in Kozhikode district in the Indian state of Kerala. It is located about 12 km north of Kozhikode city on the National Highway 66.

topPlaces.name: Koyilandy
topPlaces.description: Koyilandy (IPA: [kojilɐːɳɖi];) is a municipality and a taluk in Kozhikode district, Kerala on the Malabar Coast. The historical town is located right in the middle of the coast of Kozhikode district, between Kozhikode and Kannur, on National Highway 66.

items.note: Vettilappara is a village in Malappuram district in the state of Kerala, India.

Kanjilassery Maha Siva Temple is located at Chemancheri village in Kozhikode district, in Kerala, India. The presiding deity of the temple is Lord Shiva, located in main Sanctum Sanctorum, facing west.
Chemanchery is a village in Kozhikode district in the state of Kerala, India.

Vengalam is a town in Kerala, India, approximately 10 km from Kozhikode Railway Station (Calicut City) and very near Kappad Beach. The landmark is the Railway Overbridge inaugurated by Chief Minister V. S. Achuthanandan.
Chengottukavu is a village in Kozhikode district in the state of Kerala, India.
Thalakkulathur is a small village near Kozhikode city, along the road to Atholi, in the state of Kerala.
Elathur is a part of Calicut corporation in Kozhikode district in the Indian state of Kerala. It is located about 12 km north of Kozhikode city on the National Highway 66.

Koyilandy (IPA: [kojilɐːɳɖi];) is a municipality and a taluk in Kozhikode district, Kerala on the Malabar Coast. The historical town is located right in the middle of the coast of Kozhikode district, between Kozhikode and Kannur, on National Highway 66.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kappad?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kappad is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

The nearest airport is Calicut International Airport, Kozhikode (38 km) and the nearest railway station is Coimbatore Junction (143 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kappad?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kappad at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kappad?
faq.a: Stays in Kappad start from ₹1,200 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kappad?
faq.a: The top attractions are Vettilappara, Kanjilassery Maha Siva Temple, Chemancheri, Vengalam, Chengottukavu.
